about.title: About
about.description: A passionate student in the Internet of Things (IoT), connected systems, and intelligent data analysis. Curious about the interconnection between computing and industry, I enjoy designing solutions that combine sensors, automation, and data processing.

list.title: Edge Predictive Maintenance (edge-pdm)
list.description: Real-time anomaly detection system on ESP32 using TinyML. FFT analysis and lightweight autoencoder deployed on microcontroller.

list.title: Secure IoT Plant (mini-plant)
list.description: Secure industrial IoT plant simulation with TLS communication, real-time monitoring and alerting system.

list.title: PLC Gateway (plc-gateway)
list.description: Complete industrial gateway converting PLC Modbus protocols to OPC UA with Grafana visualization.

list.title: Industrial Monitoring Stack (monitoring-stack)
list.description: Complete industrial monitoring system with real-time data collection, processing, storage and visualization.

list.title: ESP Cloud (esp-cloud)
list.description: IoT platform connecting embedded hardware to a web-based control interface.

details: Participated in a project to improve information systems for energy data management and analysis.
Contributed to internal process automation and reliable data exchange between applications.
Discovered the operations of a major energy company and the challenges of digitalization and operational efficiency.
